introSection: Sapphire Speedster Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Merimbula's Magic Mountain in Merimbula, New South Wales, Australia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster was renamed in November of 2018, with a new colour scheme to support the new name.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and blue supports. The ride used to feature yellow track and white supports, which was later repained to blue track and white supports, before settling on the current colours in November of 2018.

fullText:
Sapphire Speedster Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Merimbula's Magic Mountain in Merimbula, New South Wales, Australia.

The coaster was renamed in November of 2018, with a new colour scheme to support the new name.



Green track and blue supports. The ride used to feature yellow track and white supports, which was later repained to blue track and white supports, before settling on the current colours in November of 2018.
